entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop for which a simulation model was developed to predict growth and development

entities.name: SIMULATION MODEL
entities.description: A model designed to simulate the development, growth, nitrogen accumulation, and yield of pigeonpea

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth stages and progression of the pigeonpea plant

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in size or biomass of the pigeonpea plant

entities.name: NITROGEN ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of nitrogen uptake and storage in the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The stage at which the plant has completed its growth cycle, ranging from extra-short to medium-duration

entities.name: WEATHER
entities.description: Atmospheric conditions that influence crop growth and development

entities.name: SOIL CONDITIONS
entities.description: The physical and chemical properties of the soil affecting crop growth

entities.name: AGRONOMIC MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Human-led practices for crop cultivation and management

entities.name: PHENOLOGICAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the plant life cycle

entities.name: LEAF AREA EXPANSION
entities.description: The increase in the total surface area of leaves

entities.name: RADIATION INTERCEPTION
entities.description: The amount of solar radiation captured by the crop canopy

entities.name: BIOMASS ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The total organic matter produced by the plant

entities.name: BIOMASS PARTITIONING
entities.description: The distribution of biomass among different plant organs

entities.name: CROP WATER USE
entities.description: The amount of water consumed by the crop

entities.name: ROOT GROWTH
entities.description: The development and expansion of the root system

entities.name: WATER EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of roots taking up water from the soil

entities.name: PLANT POPULATION DENSITY
entities.description: The number of plants per unit area, affecting leaf area expansion

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: A location in India where data sets for model testing were collected

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research data was collected

entities.name: SOWING DENSITY
entities.description: The density at which seeds are planted

entities.name: SEASONS
entities.description: Different time periods of the year affecting crop growth

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A specific type of soil used in the model testing

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A specific type of soil used in the model testing

entities.name: DRYLAND CONDITIONS
entities.description: Growth conditions characterized by limited rainfall

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Growth conditions where water is artificially supplied

entities.name: TIME TO FLOWERING
entities.description: The duration from sowing to the onset of flowering

entities.name: ABOVEGROUND BIOMASS
entities.description: The biomass of the plant parts above the soil surface

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grains

entities.name: WATERLOGGING
entities.description: Soil saturation with water that hinders root respiration

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The pattern of crops grown on a piece of land over time
